meta.tagline: Award-Winning Moving Company in Detroit, MI
meta.author: Aleksandar Spasevski
meta.doc_subtitle: Walled Lake HQ pin + Detroit Woodward GBP claim + Rochester GBP claim + organic recovery + earned-channel rebuild.

kpis.label: Maps reach by metro coord
kpis.detail: Top-20 at Walled Lake (1.0), Novi (2.0), Detroit Woodward (2.7 pin-bleed). Zero at Rochester / Royal Oak / Birmingham / Farmington Hills / Plymouth.

kpis.label: LD grid avg rank
kpis.detail: Across 906 cell-appearances / 6 kws (May 1). #3 in market by rank quality (Bos 6.5, Moving Made Easy 7.2, PM 7.9, Two Men 9.6).

kpis.label: Offices vs managed GBPs
kpis.detail: Walled Lake HQ managed. Rochester (419 Golf View Ln) + Detroit Woodward (1001 Woodward Ave) published on site but unmanaged.

kpis.label: Organic impressions, 12mo
kpis.detail: GSC monthly imp 319K (Aug 2025) → 82K (May 2026). Long-tail (51+) wiped 435 → 3 in Ahrefs.

kpis.label: Ship-ready keyword band
kpis.detail: DFS Labs Ranked Keywords: 45 at 1–10, 83 at 11–20, 258 at 21–50, 196 at 51+. The 256 in 11–50 is Lever B's primary target.

kpis.label: Backlinks · conversion events
kpis.detail: DFS Backlinks: 990 total, 247 ref domains, 17 Telegram-spam anchors. GA4 form_submit fires ~190/mo across all channels — not flagged as conversion event (P0 5-min fix).

trend.headline: Traffic dropping, conversions stable + growing
trend.annotation_text: Organic traffic fell 32% Q2 2025 → Q1 2026 (709 → 484 sessions/mo) while GBP conversions held flat and are now growing. P0 prerequisite is a 5-minute GA4 settings fix + CallRail for phone attribution.
trend.may_extrapolation_note: May 2026 conservatively extrapolated: 20 days actual + 11 days at trailing-12-month historical daily rate.

maps_presence.action: Defend — GBP optimize, review velocity, photo set

maps_presence.action: Defend — extension of WL pin reach

maps_presence.winners: Affordable Muscle Movers, Bellhop Moving, PM (pin-bleed)
maps_presence.action: CLAIM + MANAGE — closes #3 → #1 on every Detroit-modified query

maps_presence.winners: Auto Hauler Exchange, The Delia Group, Service First Logistics (non-movers)
maps_presence.action: CLAIM + MANAGE — zero Maps presence despite physical office

maps_presence.winners: O'Sullivan Moving, College Hunks, New Beginnings Moving, Wondermove
Kenway Moving, Modern Moving Michigan, Schea Van Lines, Stevens Greater Detroit

maps_presence.action: Driving Directions pin — even non-movers outrank PM here

maps_presence.winners: Stow and Go Self Storage, Dakota Lines, Expedited Freightways (non-movers)

ld_leaderboard.name: Two Men and a Truck Moving

brand_pull.note: Brand carries 54% of clicks from 12% of impressions — classic brand-pull pattern. Non-brand CTR collapsed to 0.09%.

positives: #1 Maps rank at Walled Lake coord on 8/8 priority queries (DFS live)
#3 in market by LD grid avg rank quality (7.9, behind Bos 6.5 + Moving Made Easy 7.2; ahead of Two Men 9.6 multi-pin)
45-year brand · USDOT 266582 · MCICC 178368 · CVED L19032 · 'Best Moving Company' Detroit Free Press + Oakland Press
Brand-pull strong (54% of clicks from 12% of imp)
negatives: 5 of 8 metro coords zero Maps reach — entire eastern metro invisible
Feb→May reach loss: 90 cells / 8 net top-3 placements / 94 cells on 'detroit moving company'
Rochester + Detroit Woodward GBPs unmanaged despite physical offices
60+ burb pages effectively deindexed; SEO Neo-precursor stack still active in Asana
49.6% Ahrefs-flagged spam backlinks; 17 confirmed Telegram-spam anchors via DFS
Non-brand CTR 0.09%; AI-Overview + local-pack suppression structural
GA4 returns 0 conversions across 65K sessions — measurement broken

levers.name: Conversion tracking restoration
levers.why: GA4 returns 0 conversions across 65K sessions / 901 pages / 365d. Until that's fixed everything else is invisible. form_submit IS firing (~190 events/mo across all channels) but the property-settings flag was never set.

actions.name: Mark form_submit as conversion event in GA4 property settings
Deploy CallRail phone-call tracking integrated with GA4
Verify GBP UTM ?utm_source=gmb fires into GA4
Build Q3 reporting baseline using fresh conversion data
First monthly report with M1 cleanup landed
Q3 to Q4 quarterly comparison frame

levers.outcome: Conversion + call-attribution data available for all subsequent reporting. Owner authorization required for CallRail deployment (OCI Ask 3).

levers.name: Map presence expansion
levers.why: PM has Maps reach in 3 of 8 tested metro coords. Two managed-GBP claims (Detroit Woodward + Rochester) plus 5 Driving Direction pins close the geometric ceiling that a single Walled Lake pin can't.

actions.name: Claim + manage Detroit Woodward GBP (1001 Woodward Ave) — #2.7 pin-bleed closes to #1
Claim + manage Rochester GBP (419 Golf View Ln) — zero Maps reach today
Walled Lake HQ pin optimization (description, products, photos, attributes, posts, reviews)
Driving Direction pins at Birmingham / Royal Oak / Farmington Hills / Plymouth / Bloomfield Hills
Detroit Woodward post-claim optimization
Rochester post-claim optimization

levers.outcome: 3/8 coords with PM in top-3 → 6/8 (M3 target). Detroit Woodward → #1 within 30d of claim. Rochester → top-5 within 60d.

levers.name: Page surgery (cleanup + improvement + new pages)
levers.why: 60+ of 70 burb pages effectively deindexed but still in sitemap, polluting site-quality signal. 256 keywords sit at pos 11–50 ship-ready. Homepage forced to rank for 9+ commercial queries at avg pos 26.

actions.name: 26 burb-page DELETE+301 redirects per Pages_Action_List
Upgrade 4 surviving burb pages into real location pages
/residential/hot-tub-moving-services/ (173K imp pos 14.7) brand-specific upgrade
/residential/piano-moving-services/ (125K imp pos 19.7) depth upgrade
/artwork-moving/ (76K imp pos 21.9) custom crating + museum case studies
/senior-moving/ (59K imp pos 17.0) senior-community partnerships
/residential/local-moving-services/ (52K imp pos 21.7) homepage-split cross-links
/office/furniture-installation-services/ (29K imp pos 40.7) biggest rank-lift potential
/residential/internal-small-moving/ (20K imp pos 35.0) niche specialty
Build /movers-detroit-mi/ national-mover-grade depth
Build /moving-companies-detroit-mi/ separate intent split
Build /movers-walled-lake-mi/ AI-Overview-citation-optimized
Build /moving-companies-michigan/ statewide cluster
Refocus / on brand + 3-office overview + nav into HP-01..04

levers.outcome: Each homepage-split page reaches pos 8–12. 3 of 5 priority service pages reach top-10 by M3. Site-wide quality signal lifts as burb pages drop.

levers.name: Internal linking + schema
levers.why: Service pages share homepage nav + footer but lack cross-cluster links. Blog packing posts (4,884 imp 30d) don't link to commercial /packing/. Equity not routed to the ship-ready surface.

actions.name: Priority nav + body changes routing equity into Lever B targets; footer to HP-01..04 sitewide
Blog-to-commercial pull-through + service-cluster hub-and-spoke
Areas-served hub-to-spoke (Walled Lake hub → surviving burb pages)
Schema markup deploy on all new + upgraded pages (LocalBusiness + Service + FAQ + BreadcrumbList)

levers.outcome: Service-page rankings lift 3-8 positions across the ship-ready 256-keyword band via internal-link equity routing. Schema improves SERP feature acquisition.

levers.name: Content (blog refresh + new commercial-intent articles)
levers.why: Top-imp blog gets tons of impressions but few clicks (how-to-pack-dishes 4,884 imp / 1 click). Adding commercial pull-through converts impressions into authority + click-through. New Detroit commercial-intent blog targets the 196 pos-51+ keywords.

actions.name: /2025/09/16/how-to-pack-dishes-for-moving/ → add /packing/ links + Detroit context
/2025/09/16/how-to-move-a-pool-table/ → add piano-moving cross-link
/2025/09/16/how-to-move-a-refrigerator/ → add local-moving cross-link
New: Moving cost Detroit MI 2026
New: Best moving company Detroit reviews — what to look for
New: How much to tip movers in Detroit
PAA Implementation per existing Asana task
New: piano-moving-cost (niche-service replica of TV exemplar)
New: hot-tub-moving-cost
New: artwork-moving-cost / museum-grade-handling

levers.outcome: 3–5 new commercial-intent posts ranking top-20 within 60d post-publish. Existing high-imp blog converts more clicks via commercial pull-through.

levers.name: Link hygiene + local PR + citations + local links
levers.why: DFS Backlinks shows 990 / 247 ref domains with 17 confirmed Telegram-spam anchors. Ahrefs flags 211 of 425 (49.6%) as spam. SEO Neo-precursor stack still active in Asana. Earned-channel rebuild replaces the automated stack.

actions.name: Export full backlink profile via DataForSEO Backlinks (per-URL granularity)
Build disavow file: 17 Telegram-spam + 211 Ahrefs-flagged + 44 templated anchor
Submit disavow via GSC (owner authorization OCI Ask 3)
HALT all active SEO Neo-precursor campaigns in Asana — principal instruction to Julce
Top 20 local citations (BBB / Yelp / Yellow Pages / Foursquare + 10 MI directories)
Industry citations (AMSA / ProMover / MoversAuthority / Moving.com / Mover Stars)
Detroit Free Press re-engagement on 'Best Moving Company' relationship
Oakland Press follow-up
Expert-quote pitches to Mover Magazine + Moving.com editorial
Realtor moving-niche partner outreach (Detroit area)
Oakland University relocation partner (Rochester office near OU)
Senior community partner (PM offers Senior Moving service)
Partner agreement follow-up

levers.outcome: Backlink toxicity drops as disavow processes. New automated-pattern links stop accruing. First earned link from vetted publication by M3. Citation completeness 90%+. 2-3 partner links live.
